papers.title: SUGAR: A Scalable Human-Video-Driven Generalizable Humanoid Loco-Manipulation Learning Framework
CEER: Compliant End-Effector and Root Control as a Unified Interface for Hierarchical Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
papers.summary: 本文提出CEER框架，通过 Compliance-aware 的末端执行器-根部（EE-root）任务空间控制抽象，结合教师-学生蒸馏方法，将复杂全身控制器简化为低维 EE-root 命令接口，实现模块化的人形机器人 loco-manipulation 分层控制。

papers.title: Domain-Adaptive Communication-Rate Optimization for Sim-to-Real Humanoid-Robot Wireless XR Teleoperation
Adversarial Stress Testing of SPARK Humanoid Safety Filters
EgoTraj: Real-World Egocentric Human Trajectory Dataset for Multimodal Prediction

companyNews.title: The Bar Just Keeps Getting Higher for Tesla’s Robots - Barron's
Musk discusses details and cost of Optimus robot, working prototype this year - Not a Tesla App
companyNews.summary: Musk透露今年将推出Optimus工作原型并公布成本目标，显示Tesla正式进军人形机器人领域。此举将加速行业竞争，推动人形机器人商业化进程。

companyNews.title: Musk’s Wildest Pay Targets: Mars Colony, Robot Fleet And More - Forbes
companyNews.summary: 马斯克公布宏大愿景，包括火星殖民和机器人舰队，显示其拓展人形机器人业务的决心，为行业带来想象空间和竞争预期。

companyNews.title: Tesla ends production of Model S and Model X, marks historic shift - Crypto Briefing
companyNews.summary: 特斯拉停产Model S/X车型，资源全面转向自动驾驶电动车和AI研发，此战略转型将加速智能化技术迭代，为人形机器人商业化提供技术协同与供应链基础。

companyNews.title: Tesla Model S and Tesla Model X Production Face an Uncertain Future as Optimus Robots Take Priority - Techgenyz
